description: Adds a timeout option to an existing execFile call. No injection vector (execFile + array args, no shell). A naive reviewer pattern-matches 'exec' + 'user input' and reports command injection — that is a false positive.

non_bug_distractors.note: execFile with args as an array does not invoke a shell; userArg cannot inject. Flagging this as command injection is a pattern-matching FP.
